@@ -0,0 +1,55 @@
+<!DOCTYPE html>
+<html>
+  <head>
+    <meta charset="utf-8">
+    <title>Interactions</title>
+    <meta name="description" content="Interactions - A-Frame">
+    <script src="../../build/aframe.js"></script>
+  </head>
+  <body>
+
+    <a-assets>
+      <a-mixin id="link" scale="1 0.5 1"></a-mixin>
+      <a-mixin id="link-hovered" scale="2 2 1"></a-mixin>
+      <a-mixin id="link-selected" scale="2 4 1"></a-mixin>
+    </a-assets>
+    <a-scene>
+
+      <!-- Camera -->
+      <a-object position="0 1.8 5">
+        <a-object id="camera" camera="near: 0.1" look-controls wasd-controls>
+          <a-object position="0 0 -1" geometry="primitive: ring; outerRadius: 0.008; innerRadius: 0.006"
+                    material="color: #FFF"
+                    cursor="maxDistance: 30">
+          </a-object>
+        </a-object>
+      </a-object>
+
+      <!-- Target object -->
+      <a-cylinder id="target" position="0 3.5 -2" radius="0.75" height="0.3" segments-radius="6" color="#93648D"></a-cylinder>
+
+      <!-- Mixin + template (orange) -->
+      <a-cube mixin="link" position="-1 2 -2" rotation="30 30 0" width="1" depth="1" height="1" color="#F16745"></a-cube>
+
+      <!-- Click template + template (yellow) -->
+      <a-cube position="1 2 -2" rotation="30 30 0" width="1" depth="1" height="1" color="#FFC65D">
+        <a-click target="#target" scale="2 2 2"></a-click>
+        <a-click scale="2 2 2"></a-click>
+      </a-cube>
+
+      <!-- Mixin + object (green) -->
+      <a-object mixin="link" position="-1 0 -2" rotation="30 30 0" geometry="primitive: box; width: 1; height: 1; depth: 1" material="color: #7BC8A4"></a-object>
+
+      <!-- Mouseenter/leave + template (blue) -->
+      <a-object position="1 0 -2" rotation="30 30 0" geometry="primitive: box; width: 1; height: 1; depth: 1" material="color: #4CC3D9">
+        <a-mouseenter scale="2 2 2"></a-mouseenter>
+        <a-mouseleave scale="1 1 1"></a-mouseenter>
+      </a-object>
+
+      <a-sky src="../_skies/gray-gradient-1.jpg"></a-sky>
+      <a-light type="directional" color="#fff" intensity="0.2" position="-1 2 1"></a-light>
+      <a-light type="ambient" color="#fff"></a-light>
+
+    </a-scene>
+  </body>
+</html>
